title: Everything you need to know about BackPack
bodyHtml:
BackPack is our sustainable packaging offer included in Customer Care by Back Market (CCBM).

After online checkout, the first thing your customers pay attention to is delivery, and more specifically, the unboxing experience. Packaging products in a way that matches or exceeds your customers’ expectations is important.
 
We know that finding the right packaging is challenging, and your time could be better spent focusing on product quality. So, we’ve done the work of finding the packaging for you.

Our boxes are made with recycled materials and are reusable for returns, replacements, and Trade-in purchases. Plus, with no additional packing material needed for shipping protection, you can save time, money, and the planet all at the same time.

 

Jump to:

 

  1. Type of BackPack & cost
  2. Order process
  3. Shipment information
  4. Assemble guideline

 

Can't find what you're looking for?

 

Get in touch with us via backmarket@packhelp.com, we will be happy to help you.

 

Type of BackPack & Cost

How much does BackPack cost?

BackPack for smartphones and laptops is included in your CCBM fees. This includes shipping costs, too. 

All you have to do is place your order on the BackPack platform. More information about how to place an order, please click HERE.


Which products can be shipped in BackPack packaging?

You can use our packaging for smartphones and laptops. 

The smartphone box is suitable for all smartphone models and their accessories. 

The laptop box is suitable for all laptop and MacBook models from 13–16 inches and their accessories

 

Order Process

How do I order BackPack?

Order your packaging here

 

You’ll use your Back Office admin email address to log in, but your BackPack password is unique to this platform (it’s not your Back Office admin password).

If you forget your BackPack password, reset it by clicking “Forgot your password?”. 

 

Here’s the process step by step for first-time orders:

 

  • Step 1: Visit backpack.backmarket.com. Or access the platform directly from your Back Office "Options" > "Delivery".
  • Step 2: Use your Back Office admin email address to log in. 
  • Step 3: You’ve received a temporary password by email. Use it to log in.
  • Step 4: Reset the temporary password.
  • Step 5: Fill in your account details and shipping address.
  • Step 6: Choose the packaging you need and the quantity, and add the order to your shopping cart.
    • Note: Your packaging order will be limited based on your sales and is predicted to cover up to 3 months of sales.
  • Step 7: Confirm your shipping address and place the order. You’ll receive email confirmation and shipping details in the following days.

 

Is the packaging safe for shipping?

The BackPack packaging was rigorously tested by our Innovation Lab to withstand any potential shipping damage.

The packaging employed is specifically engineered to ensure product safety. This entails shipping smartphones exclusively in designated smartphone packaging and laptops solely in laptop packaging.

Minor external damage during transit won't affect the device, ensuring it arrives in pristine condition.

 

Shipment Information

How long will shipping take?

Once your order is confirmed, you’ll receive an order confirmation email. 

  • All orders placed before 4:00 PM on business days will be processed and prepared for shipment within 2 business days.
  • After the parcel is picked up, shipping will take 7–9 business days, depending on the shipment location.
  • The total process will take up 9 - 11 business days  

How can I track my order status?

Once your order has shipped, you’ll receive a tracking link and be able to view it directly in your BackPack account. 

You will go to “My Account” -> “Orders” on the packaging platform.

Or you can use Order number and track through the carrier website. 

 

Example:

 

  • Step 1: If your carrier is K&N, you can access: https://mykn.kuehne-nagel.com/public-tracking/
  • Step 2: Type your Order number in the search bar, and you will see the shipment details.
